caseResults.finalTranslation: If it rains tomorrow morning, we're not going to the park. We should go to the coffee shop nearby and check next week's formation.

caseResults.finalTranscript: 我把下周出差的安排又整理了一遍,周一早上先去机场,落地后直接去客户办公室,下午三点做产品演示,晚上如果大家还有时间,我想再约一次简短的复盘,把对方临时提出的问题都记下来,免得第二天讨论食移漏,另外我会把样机和充电器分开装,材料也提前打印两份放在包里,这样现场如如果临时需要补充说明,就不用再守盲角乱地找文件。
caseResults.finalTranslation: I've arranged the next week's trip again, going to the airport first Monday morning, going to the client's office immediately after landing, doing a product presentation at 3:00 p.m., and I would like to make a short rematch at night, if you have time, so as to write down the questions that the other side has asked temporarily, so that I will not have to discuss them the following day, and I will separate the prototype and the charger and put them in the bag in advance, so that if the site requires additional information, it will not have to look for documents in blind places.
